title: Senior Fleet Manager at Business Post India

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Business Post India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Business Post India! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Business Post India:
Business Post India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Business Post India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
